languages.text: {n}Женщина оборачивается и на секунду кажется, что она кинется на вас, но затем жительница Клети вновь переводит взгляд на своего товарища.{/n}
{n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Женщина оборачивается и на секунду кажется, что она кинется на вас, но затем жительница Клети вновь переводит взгляд на своего товарища.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her fallen comrade.{/n}

{n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her fallen comrade.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那女人转过身，有那么一瞬间，她似乎要朝你扑来。但很快，这个牢笼居民又把目光转向她的同伴。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那女人转过身，有那么一瞬间，她似乎要朝你扑来。但很快，这个牢笼居民又把目光转向她的同伴。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kadın dönüyor, bir anlığına sana saldıracakmış gibi görünüyor. Ardından Kafes sakini, bakışlarını tekrar yoldaşına çeviriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadın dönüyor, bir anlığına sana saldıracakmış gibi görünüyor. Ardından Kafes sakini, bakışlarını tekrar yoldaşına çeviriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La femme se tourne vers vous et, l'espace d'un instant, semble sur le point de vous attaquer, mais elle reporte ensuite son attention sur son compagnon d'armes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La femme se tourne vers vous et, l'espace d'un instant, semble sur le point de vous attaquer, mais elle reporte ensuite son attention sur son compagnon d'armes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mujer se gira y, por un momento, parece a punto de abalanzarse sobre ti. Después, la habitante de la Jaula devuelve la mirada a su camarada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Frau dreht sich um und für eine Sekunde scheint es, als würde sie sich auf dich stürzen. Dann wendet die Bewohnerin des Käfigs ihren Blick wieder ihrem gefallenen Kameraden zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Frau dreht sich um und für eine Sekunde scheint es, als würde sie sich auf dich stürzen. Dann wendet die Bewohnerin des Käfigs ihren Blick wieder ihrem gefallenen Kameraden zu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}その女性は振り返り、一瞬、あなたに襲いかかるかのように見える。しかし、ケージの住人である彼女は、再び仲間のほうを見つめた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman turns, and for a second it seems she might lunge at you. Then the denizen of the Cage shifts her gaze back to her comrade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}その女性は振り返り、一瞬、あなたに襲いかかるかのように見える。しかし、ケージの住人である彼女は、再び仲間のほうを見つめた。{/n}
